function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web for a query and return relevant snippets.

function.name: fetch_url
function.description: Fetch the content of a specific URL.

function.name: read_document
function.description: Read the contents of a local document at a given path.

path.description: The path to the document file.

cases.prompt: Find the current stock price of Apple Inc. on Google.
Search for the latest news about the Artemis space mission.
What is the capital of France? Look it up online to verify.
Find the release date and specs of NVIDIA RTX 5090.
Who won the most recent Super Bowl? Search the web.
Search for the documentation of Python 3.12's new features.
Find the schedule for the next solar eclipse.
Fetch the contents of https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Python_(programming_language) to summarize it.
Read the text from the web page at https://news.ycombinator.com.
Go to https://github.com/trending and fetch the trending repositories.
Please retrieve the HTML content of http://example.com.
Fetch the article at https://blog.mozilla.org/en/products/firefox/new-firefox/.
Open the link http://www.google.com and fetch the landing page content.
Open the local file at docs/ISSUE_TASKS.md and read it.
Read the local configuration file at config/settings.json.

Open the report file at data/report.pdf and extract its text.
